title: spiesia leptophylla
intro: Spiesia leptophylla, also known as Shepherd's Needle or Needle Spiesia, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The health benefits of Spiesia leptophylla include its ability to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Spiesia leptophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
